label: Probability theory

node.label: Probability theory
node.definition: Random variables, distributions, conditional dependence, and expectation provide the language of uncertainty and generative modeling.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Probability theory is modeled as an upstream prerequisite for downstream nodes such as Statistics & experimental design, Information theory, Signal processing & harmonic analysis.
examples: atlas downstream link to Statistics & experimental design
atlas downstream link to Information theory
atlas downstream link to Signal processing & harmonic analysis
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting.
